ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Quotes__c)) , OR( ISCHANGED(Customer__c), ISCHANGED(Sales_Org__c), ISCHANGED(Distr_Channel__c), ISCHANGED(Deliver_Plant__c) ,ISCHANGED(Business_Model__c), ISCHANGED(Terms_Of_Payment__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can't change the fields populated from the quotation.
